name: pax8-mcp
description: Every Pax8 Partner API endpoint, plus an offline store that reconciles billing, tracks MRR, and catches usage overages no Pax8 tool surfaces.

pax8_client_id.title: PAX8_CLIENT_ID
pax8_client_id.description: Sets PAX8_CLIENT_ID for the Pax8 MCP server.

pax8_client_secret.title: PAX8_CLIENT_SECRET
pax8_client_secret.description: Sets PAX8_CLIENT_SECRET for the Pax8 MCP server.

pax8_oauth_scope.title: PAX8_OAUTH_SCOPE
pax8_oauth_scope.description: Sets PAX8_OAUTH_SCOPE for the Pax8 MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.
